constraints.consistency: must agree with the number of members; never claim more people than the roster renders

constraints.order: seniority / accountability first — the single accountable lead is item 1

photo.description: FOTO REAL del squad: la clave resuelve a assets/squad/squad-<nombre>.png por allowlist cerrada (UnknownResolverValueError si no existe). GUARDRAIL DURO DEL DOMINIO: NUNCA una cara generada por IA ni retoque generativo del rostro — presentar una cara fabricada como parte del equipo es tergiversación, no un tema estético. Si falta la foto de alguien, se pide la foto; no se fabrica.

name.description: nombre REAL de la persona de la foto — el binding foto↔nombre↔rol lo confirma el operador humano, nunca lo asume un agente

dedication.description: written verbatim into .pct including the % sign — the renderer does not append it

presentation.composition: full-canvas photo roster: header (eyebrow + title + meta chip) above a cohesive row of 4-6 photo cards — real portrait, role, name, dedication
presentation.staffingPolicy: every card is a real, staffable person with a real dedication; the single accountable lead is mandatory and is always item 1
presentation.rendererNote: the photo is painted by the squad-person resolver as an effect; the blueprint card in the HTML is a real example (julio) that the filler clones and overwrites
